videos.headline: Oklahoma survives vs. Tulane for win
videos.description: Oklahoma nearly blows a 21-point lead, but gets some clutch plays late to survive Tulane's upset bid.

videos.headline: Jackson Arnold keeps it himself for Oklahoma TD
videos.description: Oklahoma quarterback Jackson Arnold keeps it and scores the short rushing touchdown vs. Tulane.

videos.description: Taylor Tatum hauls in the catch and finds the end zone for a 9-yard touchdown.
